principles: Use the Chinese source PDF as the only runtime layout anchor.
English target text often expands and needs Western word wrapping, so expand paragraph frames before shrinking font size.
Do not use official English reference pages during generation; use them only after the run for offline comparison.

target_composition.reason: For zh->en body copy, source bboxes are redaction/order anchors. The English paragraph frame must be recomposed from current-page body band, margins, and remaining readable area before font shrink.

target_language_reflow.reason: For zh->en, same-source bbox fitting over-shrinks body text. Expand current-page text frames within the same page band before shrink.

D2_translation: Translate into natural English suitable for an annual report.
Do not copy Chinese punctuation rhythm into English; use Western word wrapping and concise paragraphs.
Provide compact English variants for chart labels, table cells, legends, and side navigation.
D4_layout_plan: For paragraph body copy, treat source bboxes as redaction/order anchors, not hard containers; recompute target visual composition within the current page body band before shrinking font size.
Do not accept tiny English body text merely because it fits the Chinese source bbox.
Preserve graphics, tables, side navigation anchors, and section bands while recomputing body paragraph frames.
D7_quality_gate: Fail if English body font is visually much smaller than annual-report body text or if excessive blank space remains after over-compression.
Judge official English only after the run as offline comparison, not as runtime evidence.

source_separator_policy.reason: do not reflow translated text across visible source headings, years, bullets, or separators that are not translation units

target_composition.reason: For zh->en body copy, source bboxes are redaction/order anchors. The English paragraph frame must be recomposed from current-page body band, margins, and remaining readable area before font shrink.

target_language_reflow.reason: For zh->en, same-source bbox fitting over-shrinks body text. Expand current-page text frames within the same page band before shrink.
